name: AICommit
description: AICommit is a JetBrains IDE plugin that generates editable commit messages from staged changes.

generateCommitMessages.description: Generate an editable commit-message draft from staged changes in the JetBrains Commit tool window.
generateCommitMessages.input: Developer-selected staged changes inside the IDE

apiSurface.notes: AICommit is installed and operated inside JetBrains IDEs rather than through a public hosted API.
